name: Cookie Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter and powdered sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the salt and vanilla extract to the mixture and beat again.
3. Divide the icing into separate containers if desired, then add food coloring as needed.
4. If the icing becomes too stiff during storage, add a few drops of water to adjust consistency.
5. Store the icing in a sealed container in the refrigerator for several days.
6. Allow the icing to come to room temperature before using.
Note: The original recipe text has been rewritten to improve clarity and consistency while maintaining the exact same title as specified. No additional ingredients or steps were added, and obvious typos have been corrected.
